# PERF-194 negative: the handler waits on a condition channel instead of polling
lang: go
file: PERF-194-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"time"
)

func Handle(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, ready <-chan struct{}) {
	select {
	case <-ready:
	case <-r.Context().Done():
		return
	case <-time.After(5 * time.Second):
		return
	}
	w.WriteHeader(200)
}
